title: Qi Men Dun Jia — The Highest Level of Chinese Metaphysics
summary: Qi Men Dun Jia is considered the "Emperor's Art" and the highest form of Chinese divination.
content:
Qi Men Dun Jia (奇门遁甲) is the most advanced form of Chinese divination, traditionally used for military strategy and high-stakes decision-making.

【The Name】
Qi = the three special stems (Bing, Ding, Yi). Men = the eight gates. Dun = to conceal. Jia = the leading Heavenly Stem. Together: "using the special energies and gates to conceal and protect."

【The Eight Gates】
- Rest Gate (休): Good for rest, wealth, marriage
- Birth Gate (生): Excellent for starting ventures, business
- Hurt Gate (伤): Bad for business, good for hunting
- Barrier Gate (杜): Neutral, good for hiding, military
- Scene Gate (景): Good for exams, writing, tourism
- Death Gate (死): Unfavorable for most activities
- Alarm Gate (惊): Good for legal matters, bad for travel
- Open Gate (开): Excellent for openings, travel, fame

【Applications】
Originally created for warfare, Qi Men is now used for: choosing favorable dates and directions, business strategy and investment timing, and personal decision-making.
